_comment: Historical photo manifest for maldon-ng-drive. Add your photos here. 'file' is relative to data/photos/. Leave 'file' empty if no photo available yet — a placeholder card will be generated.
_usage: Run: python3 tools/generate.py  — billboards appear in-game at each GPS location.

photos.caption: Maldon East station looking south from the platform toward the goods shed and engine shed.
Station Road entrance to Maldon East. GER station building in red brick with canopy.
Maldon Hythe — Thames barges loading at the historic quay. Salt and grain trade.
BR Standard Class 2 2-6-2T approaching Maldon East on the branch from Witham.
Langford & Ulting halt — a simple wooden platform on the Maldon branch.
